used_libraries.name: USBJoystick
used_libraries.author: Jaakko Koivisto
used_libraries.sentence: Allows Arduino Nano 33 BLE -board to act as a USB joystick.
used_libraries.paragraph: Allows Arduino Nano 33 BLE -board to act as a USB joystick.

used_libraries.name: USBHID
used_libraries.author: Arduino
used_libraries.sentence: Mouse/Keyboard/HID support for mbed enabled boards

build_properties: tools.openocd.bootloader.pattern="{path}/{cmd}" {bootloader.verbose} -s "{path}/share/openocd/scripts/" -f interface/{programmer.protocol}.cfg -f {programmer.transport_script} -f target/nrf52.cfg -c "telnet_port disabled; init; reset init; halt; adapter speed 10000; echo INFO:removed_mass-erase; program {/home/derpsmastah/.arduino15/packages/arduino/hardware/mbed_nano/4.2.1/bootloaders/nano33ble/bootloader.hex}; reset run; shutdown"

tools.openocd.program.pattern="{path}/{cmd}" {program.verbose} -s "{path}/share/openocd/scripts/" -f interface/{programmer.protocol}.cfg -f {programmer.transport_script} -f target/nrf52.cfg -c "telnet_port disabled; init; reset init; halt; adapter speed 10000; program {/home/derpsmastah/.cache/arduino/sketches/EFFDEFA9320A4E316FA523DEA1C2149F/MadgwickFusionAdvancedJoystick.ino.elf}; reset run; shutdown"

tools.openocd.upload.pattern="{path}/{cmd}" {upload.verbose} -s "{path}/share/openocd/scripts/" -f interface/{programmer.protocol}.cfg -f {programmer.transport_script} -f target/nrf52.cfg -c "telnet_port disabled; init; reset init; halt; adapter speed 10000; program {/home/derpsmastah/.cache/arduino/sketches/EFFDEFA9320A4E316FA523DEA1C2149F/MadgwickFusionAdvancedJoystick.ino.elf}; reset run; shutdown"
